message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker and coverage baseline map

- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue states reflecting recent work on
  hostcall rewrite engine, scenario-cell gate pipeline, and phase1
  matrix validation features
- docs/coverage-baseline-map.json: update coverage baselines to
  reflect new modules (hostcall_rewrite) and expanded test coverage
  from bench_schema, ci_full_suite_gate, and qa_docs_policy tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
